task: Replace the private Tallinn planning surface with a public tribe and session amplification studio, add two durable aliases, and make workshop provenance honest.
surface: FrankX public experience routes and workshop index
audience: Speakers, coaches, tribe leads, venue hosts, and attendees gathering in Tallinn around Mindvalley U 2026.
first_read: An independent FrankX studio that helps a live room create a useful artifact and a stronger afterlife.

references.label: Mindvalley U official 2026 page
references.reason: Current event facts, official imagery, community scale, and typographic reference without copying the page system.

references.label: Mindvalley U official FAQ
references.reason: Official speaker, agenda, venue, and attendee boundaries; the FrankX page sends official-event questions here.

references.label: FrankX GlowCard
references.reason: Proven liquid material and cursor-light behavior, reused selectively for interactive choices.

references.label: FrankX Ikigai & Branding workshop
references.reason: The one workshop Frank identifies as personally built and delivered; anchors honest workshop provenance.

keep: FrankX obsidian material, large editorial type, rounded CTA language, and restrained tech-spectrum light
Artifact-led session logic and independent-event disclosure
avoid: Private collaborator, accommodation, budget, scheduling, or demand-gate details
Generic workshop card walls and false delivery claims
Mindvalley font copying, imitation, or implied affiliation
direction.signature: A live session-amplifier that turns visitor role and desired outcome into an inspectable before / in-room / after plan.
system: Poppins display, Inter body, JetBrains Mono for compact readouts
Obsidian foundation with cyan and emerald signal roles plus one restrained amber bridge accent
Official images remain remote, unedited, attributed, linked, and visually subordinate to the FrankX product loop
React state plus CSS transitions; no Track B scroll runtime
All information remains visible under reduced motion

asset_quality.why_premium: The primary visual is a real interactive planning loop rendered in the page. Official Mindvalley share assets provide secondary, source-linked event context rather than decorative filler.

artifacts.notes: Vercel preview inspected with cloud-browser full-page captures at 1440 x 1000 and 390 x 844 CSS pixels, plus a dedicated 390-pixel interest-form capture. Hierarchy, image framing, responsive stacking, field legibility, and CTA flow passed.
Full-page 1440-pixel cloud-browser capture confirmed the delivered-foundation versus studio-architecture distinction is visually dominant and every undeveloped format carries a Studio draft label.
Official Mindvalley U 2026 Tallinn Open Graph/share image; date and city text are legible and accurate.
Official Tallinn 2024 community image; may only appear with a 2024 caption and official-source link.

checks.name: asset-tier
checks.evidence: Primary page artifact is Tier C interactive UI; official source-cited images are secondary event context.

checks.name: export-inspection
checks.evidence: Inspected full-page Vercel-preview captures at 2880 x 14658 output pixels for desktop and 780 x 25628 output pixels for mobile, plus a 780 x 1688 conversion-form capture and a 2880 x 9038 workshop-index capture.

checks.name: visual-qa
checks.evidence: Desktop and mobile captures show no clipping, horizontal overflow, overlap, broken images, or unreadable controls. Animation-disabled capture preserves every section and conversion action.

checks.name: privacy-boundary
checks.evidence: Preview HTML and source scans contain no collaborator name, hotel, private budget, travel, or internal demand-gate details. Both legacy public aliases canonicalize to the sanitized public studio.

checks.name: motion-purpose
checks.evidence: Motion is limited to role/outcome state emphasis and card affordance; no decorative scroll scene.

checks.name: remote-build-and-runtime
checks.evidence: Vercel preview compiled, type-checked, generated routes, and reached READY. Runtime error clusters are empty; observed requests were successful, with one unrelated Vercel flags probe returning 400.

checks.name: route-and-form-contract
checks.evidence: Canonical route, both requested aliases, a format detail route, and /workshops return 200 with correct canonicals. The unified /api/intake honeypot path returns a safe success without storing or emailing data.

score.notes: Premium composition, truthful provenance, privacy boundary, responsive conversion flow, remote build, and runtime checks passed. Two points remain reserved for a post-merge keyboard-only production smoke and a real operator-confirmed intake delivery using non-test contact details.

known_risks: Official images are source-hosted share assets, not an explicit general-use license; keep usage to attributed linked previews.
The current public Git history still contains the retired internal planning even after the public tree is sanitized.
Local browser automation remained held by the machine safety floor, so visual QA used a cloud browser against the Vercel preview; a keyboard-only production smoke remains advisable after merge.
